body:
## Summary

- **30 Saudi ICP targets** (`data/saudi_icp_targets.json`) — 8 sectors: عقاري، مقاولات، ضيافة، فعاليات، لوجستيات، مطاعم، صحة، معارض سيارات — كل شركة بألمها الخليجي المحدد وأولوية P0/P1
- **Daily runner** (`scripts/gmail_daily_outreach.py`) — picks top 10 sector-diversified targets each morning, renders full Arabic email (sector angle + غرفة قيادة bullets + CTA), writes `data/daily_outreach_{date}.json`, updates cooldown
- **Extended angle map** in `auto_client_acquisition/email/daily_targeting.py` — 3 new sectors + `render_outreach_email()` with command-room section
- **Makefile targets**: `make daily-outreach` | `make daily-outreach-drafts`
- **39 tests pass** (30 new + 9 existing doctrine guards)

## How to use

```bash
# Every morning — generate today's 10 targets + emails
make daily-outreach

# When emails are filled in saudi_icp_targets.json → create Gmail drafts
make daily-outreach-drafts

# Filter by sector or count
python scripts/gmail_daily_outreach.py --sector real_estate_developer --count 5
```

## Test plan

- [ ] `make daily-outreach` runs without errors and prints 10 Arabic emails
- [ ] Each email includes sector-specific angle + غرفة قيادة bullets + Calendly CTA
- [ ] Adding a `contact_email` to a target → `--mode drafts` creates Gmail draft
- [ ] `last_contacted` updates in JSON after each run (30-day cooldown works)
- [ ] All 39 tests pass: `pytest tests/test_gmail_daily_outreach.py -v`

https://claude.ai/code/session_01REqDcNZAq2ZHceQWUfrkTf

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01REqDcNZAq2ZHceQWUfrkTf)_

commits.messageBody:
… Gmail runner

- Add data/saudi_icp_targets.json: 30 Saudi company archetypes across 8 sectors
  (real_estate, construction, hospitality, events, logistics, restaurant_chain,
  healthcare_clinic, car_dealership) with Arabic pain signals and P0/P1 priority
- Add scripts/gmail_daily_outreach.py: standalone daily runner that picks top 10
  sector-diversified targets, generates Arabic emails with command-room bullets,
  writes daily digest JSON, updates last_contacted cooldown
- Extend auto_client_acquisition/email/daily_targeting.py: add 3 missing sector
  angles, subject hook map, and render_outreach_email() with full AR template
- Add Makefile targets: daily-outreach and daily-outreach-drafts
- Add 30 tests covering all angle/email/script logic (39 total pass)

Usage: make daily-outreach  |  python scripts/gmail_daily_outreach.py --mode drafts

https://claude.ai/code/session_01REqDcNZAq2ZHceQWUfrkTf
commits.messageHeadline: feat(outreach): daily Arabic email targeting system — 30 Saudi ICPs +…

title: feat(outreach): daily Arabic email targeting system — 30 Saudi ICPs + Gmail runner
